description_long: This object is a rectangular stone relief featuring four human-like figures carved in high relief, standing side by side. The figures are depicted in a traditional ancient Egyptian style, with elongated bodies and detailed musculature, and one smaller figure is present between the third and fourth larger figures. The surface of the stone is rough and weathered, with visible chisel marks and a matte finish. The relief is set into a thick slab of stone, with the figures emerging from a recessed background. The coloration is predominantly a sandy beige with some darker shadows accentuating the carved details. The back and sides of the slab are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the focus on the front relief.
description: A rectangular stone relief with four carved human-like figures in ancient Egyptian style, set against a rough, sandy beige background.
description_view_0: The front view shows the detailed relief of four human-like figures and one smaller figure, all carved into a rectangular stone slab.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thinness of the slab and the depth of the relief carving, with little detail visible.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the plain, unadorned back of the stone slab, with the figures' outlines faintly visible in reverse.
description_view_3: The right side view again highlights the slab's thin profile and the depth of the relief, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_ornamentation: The front face is ornamented with high-relief carvings of four human-like figures and one smaller figure, all in an ancient Egyptian style.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, flat extension of the stone slab, with no visible steps, platforms, or decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is not distinct; the top edge is flat and unadorned, forming a straight line above the figures.
